stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding Monsoons?

options.a: Only the SW monsoon affecting the west coast of India is very moist.
options.b: In winter the "Crachin" affecting Hong Kong is caused by the SE monsoon.
options.c: The monsoon low of India causes the SE trades which have crossed the Equator to form the SW monsoon to turn left in the Bay of Bengal to affect the coast of India.
options.d: The NE monsoon is due to the inflow of air into the large low pressure area over India.
